name: State Street Spdr S&P/Asx 200 Listed Property Etf
analysis: SLF has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 10% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$13.0000. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$13.2800, stop A$12.2364, target A$16.4108 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
